name: Tool Proposal

labels: enhancement, tool-proposal

---

## Tool Name

**Name:** [e.g., "First Principles Thinking"]

**Category:** [Create / Decide / Diagnose / Research / Systems / Execute]

## Purpose

[One sentence describing what this tool does and when to use it]

## Description

[Detailed explanation of the tool, including:]
- How it works
- When to use it
- When NOT to use it
- Common pitfalls

## Example Usage

```
User: "[Example question]"

AI: "[Example response using the tool]"
```

## References

- [Academic papers, books, or articles that describe this tool]
- [Links to existing implementations or discussions]

## Checklist

- [ ] Tool is not already in the toolkit
- [ ] Tool has clear, actionable steps
- [ ] Tool includes examples
- [ ] Tool includes common pitfalls
- [ ] Tool fits into an existing category
